examples: He was greeted by the chant of "Judas! Judas!"
Judas, reborn, is about to face the world.
The actors who went naked in The Judas Kiss had a different approach.
When the UK Foreign Secretary, Jack Straw, went to Gibraltar, he was booed by demonstrators shouting "traitor" and "Judas".
As portrayed by Josh Young, who gives one of the more successful performances of the show, Judas is an amped-up wreck.
